entry.title: Re: SAP GUI 800 getting error 15
entry.content:
Hi Gordon,

Check if you have any missing authorization SU53?

BR

SS

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to deliver recruiters first name in em...
entry.content:
Hi @beyreli ,

you could try to experiment with a custom field on the job requisition in which you would populate the first name of the recruiter. This custom field should then be configured as custom token (via provisioning) so you could utilize it in emails.

The downside is, that I do not see a possibility to automatically fill the new field with the first name of the recruiter, as business rules do not give us access to this data.

One could also think of exploring the possibilities of the Integration Center to automatically fill in the new field with the first name of the recruiter.

Hope this helps.

BR
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Validation on template correctness for file upload in...
entry.content:
Hi Shweta,

For MDG-BP and MDG-M the default option for File upload is through MDG mass processing and consolidation. While in MDG-F it is through the traditional file upload.

The best way to ensure file correctness is to use file download to download existing data, then use the same downloaded file after making edits to upload again. This ensures the file semantics are correct.

For more details around file upload you can refer to : File Upload | SAP Help Portal

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Hyderabad, India)
entry.content: Please share your personal mail ID to consider your attendance.

entry.title: Re: Fixed asset screen layout
entry.content:
Hello,

  • You can add custom fields to the tab General Data/Physical Inventory Data.
  • You can also add custom fields to the Time -Dependent Data tab.
  • Please check the following link for your reference: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/d005b509884040b18a9d6c092082a325.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: SAP Continuous Influence for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition - Key User and Developer Exensibility
entry.content:
Hello SAP Customers and Partners,

You may wish to influence SAP software and services to address your business needs and would like to see your ideas and feedback incorporated in the product. Since SAP's ticketing systems is meant only to address fixing of errors in S/4HANA Cloud, it is not the right channel to submit new feature requests to SAP. Instead, you may leverage our SAP Continuous Influence Sessions portal for this purpose.  

How to Open session and submit request:

  • Open link SAP Continuous Influence Sessions.
  • Goto section ERP and Finance Products and click on 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition'.
  • New window will open then select 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Key User and Developer Extensibility session'.
  • You need S-User to submit and vote in Customer Influence portal, you need to accept respective terms and conditions once.
  • Here you submit one request per improvement ask, such as for a dedicated CDS view or SAP Fiori app.
  • Please check: Has a similar request already been raised? Use the "Search" functionality for your check. If available, make use of the voting mechanism otherwise submit new request.

Customers and Partners implementing and using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition are entitled to submit improvement requests and vote.

  • You submit and vote for non go-live critical feature requests. 
  • Fast track process and 1 vote principle we follow in this continuous influence channel which is different than other SAP Continuous Influence channels.

Thank you for your continuous contributions. We look forward to continuing our journey with you in coming years. The complete list of all SAP Continuous Influence Sessions is available here.

entry.title: Re: Missing Properties for Extension Object Collection
entry.content: We have updated the MDK editor with a new release that includes this fix. Please test your original issue again.

entry.title: APIs for Warehousing - OData v4. Count Physical Inventory issue.
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am using the Physical Inventory API in my BTP Application and want to perform the COUNT as described in the link. Unfortunately, I am having some troubles with it, therefore I want to understand how it is supposed to work.

To be able to perform an Inventory COUNT I have to have a Inventory Document, which I created in my SAP EWM System as we can see below.

I notice that there exists a Physical Inventory Item ( Header Item ) for this document, but no Count Item ( since I did not perform the count yet ).

To perform the COUNT I implemented the BATCH call as mentioned in the Dokumentation and when I am executing it, I get following error:

"This physical inventory item doesn't exist."

This lead to my question: 

Since the BATCH call requires this two PUT calls in it.

How can the BATCH call require a PUT request of the Physical Inventory Count Item, if the Item does not exists yet?

entry.title: Re: BAPI for MB52 and MMSC
entry.content:
Hello Rajib

I'm not familiar with IS-R.
Please investigate which BAPI is provided to enable an update to Retail-Material Master Storagelocation...
A quick Google-search mentions "BAPI_MATERIAL_MAINTAINDATA_RT" as an alternative (it contains "STORAGELOCATIONDATA" / "STORAGELOCATIONDATAX" tables) ...

Kind regards

Nic T.

entry.title: Useful ways to use ‘Variables’ and ‘Cardinality’ rule functions in Onboarding and Employee central
entry.content:
The requirement from the customer was to ensure that every person completing their onboarding process was to complete one document in the ‘Work Permit’ portlet.  This is relatively straight forward as you could us the cardinality functions to ensure they have at least one document.

An example of this rule would look like this.

The cardinality function is adding up how many values are in the ‘work permit’ portlet and raising a message if one is not entered.  You can then add in other statements to the ‘If’ statement for a particular legal entity.  Or if you only wanted this to trigger in onboarding, you could add in the following statement.

This solution can work on any portlet.

However, if you want to build logic based on specific values then you could do this by adding a ‘Variable’ to the rule.  The variable allows you to specify a ‘where’ statement.

In our rule we have created a variable var_passport and var_residence, these allows us to refer to them in the ‘if’ condition.

So, in our first ‘if’ condition we have if the variable ‘var_passport’ is equal to null, i.e. is the value GBR-Passport is not added, and if variable var_residence (UK Resident card) is added, we can raise a message asking the using to add in a passport.

You can create any number of variables in the rule to use in the ‘if’ statements, in the example below we are saying if you employed in UK then you will need to add in a Passport.

 

During hiring you may have oninit rules pre-populating fields in national id portlet.  During internal hire these rules will trigger again and overwrite the data.  The rule below will use the cardinality function to prevent this.

 

Finally, another example of this the rule below were we add in a Variable for personal email address, and trigger an error message if a personal email address is not provided for certain users as defined on a generic object.

In summary the use of variables and cardinality give you flexibility to ensure hires in onboarding and employee central submit the correct information

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite

Alternatively, you can follow the same old way, generate the channel using default based on the generated service instance key, but will need to manually add a namespace tag in the json as below

 

so far it works for me.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ - Post Actions not executed
entry.content:
Hi MaciejD,

I have also seen the similar kind of issue, this is due to the insert sql operations CPQ does and while the transaction is being proceed we in the post action write the script to modify some quote object does this. Try to move the order of post actions.
This worked for me.

Thanks,

Akhilesh.

entry.title: Re: Smart Multi Input as ValueListParameterIn
entry.content:
Hey Hi,

Probably its too late, In future if have a similar issue. try to keep the parent entity field case and the multi input entity which is child of parent entity field case same. Then it will worked for me.

Example.
parent have fields

sitecode,

...... your header fields

Child should have fields

sitecode,

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: {name: '<valuehelpentity>' , element: '<valuehelpfield>' } ,
additionalBinding: [{ localElement: 'sitecode', element: '<sitecode from valuehelp>' , usage: #FILTER}],
distinctValues: true }]

<yourfield>

entry.title: Attachment Copy
entry.content:
Currently we have Developed RAP Services in BTP ABAP Environment. I am using these in Fiori. So I have Parent Entity called StudyAssignment and a child entity to store attachments. 

After one record is created. And attachments are added to it, I want to create a new record with same as the previous record created. So I will just click Copy then a new record should be created with all the fields from the parent and its attachments should get Created. 

I am able to create the header fields, but attachments I am not able to copy from one record to other. Can you please help if you know how to handle this.

entry.title: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal ID or Not ?
entry.content:
I add Yahoo Mail (As a Second Mail) with SAP Universal ID.

In this process i received Verification code on Yahoo Mail and put this code and complete the process.

I want to know, How to Verify, Yahoo Mail is Add with SAP Universal ID or Not, because when I repeat this process, SAP Show Notification "E-mail is already part of your SAP Universal ID"

Help me, Because I have to take an Certificate Exam.

entry.title: Re: Auto-enrollment to Classes based on defined criteria/s
entry.content:
Hi Melanie

 

Auto-enrolling based on defined criteria is possible through the webservices that LMS provides.
If you check the Learning OData API Reference document, you'll see that there are microservices available that will allow for enrollment.
We used this to auto-enroll employees from a specific department based on their hire date: whenever a session would open up, the person with the oldest hire date was automatically enrolled.

 

Kr

Thomas

entry.title: Custom Enhancement Tab in SAP GUI
entry.content:
Hi team, 

In CJ20N, How to get Custom Enhancement Tab in Network. 

I'm new to this, so please help me with detailed process. 

 

Here in this picture, there is no Custom Enhancement tab

But I need like this

entry.title: Re: Calculation Scenario Filter does not work as expected
entry.content: If I understand you correctly, filter 4 ("not in (\"VALUE\", '''') or isNull(\"VALUE\")") is returning records. Assuming a pretty direct mapping in your scenario this would mean that a statement like select * from "src" where ("Col_202501" not in ('') or "Col_202501" is null) would need to return records which looks wrong to me with the data that are provided by you. To me it looks surprising that you exclude '' but include nulls. I would rather expect "in (\"VALUE\", '''') or isNull(\"VALUE\")" instead of "not in (\"VALUE\", '''') or isNull(\"VALUE\")" Anyway, if you have a behavior difference between HANA Cloud and HANA 2, please open an incident.

entry.title: How to Configure Serial Number Profile for Mandatory GR and Optional GI
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to configure a Serial Number Profile to meet the following requirements:

  1. During goods receipt (GR) for purchase orders, it should be mandatory to enter a serial number.
  2. During goods issue (GI) for production orders (e.g., issuing components to a production order via MIGO), entering a serial number should be optional.

In particular, I would like to configure the system so that serial number entry is required for purchasing-related movements but optional for production-related movements.

Could anyone guide me on how to set up the Serializing Procedure in the Serial Number Profile to achieve this?

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: 3/3 From JavaScript to TypeScript: The Shocking Results of Our SAPUI5 Transformation

FYI your team's journey to TypeScript might benefit from Joule support, see SAPUI5 Meets TypeScript: A Smooth Migration Journey with Joule

entry.title: Re: SAP Public cloud (Grow) - option to develop simple APPs
entry.content:
In fact, you can develop in S4 Public Cloud (only with Abap cloud). You can do it as soon as you are in 3 system layer mode (3SL)
You can develop from system 080.
Introducing SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Re: SAP Enterprise Integration Strategy - Integration Solution Advisory Methodology (ISA-M)
entry.content: Great overview of ISA-M! I'm curious how it addresses practical implementation challenges in complex environments. Specifically, how does it guide integration with mixed SAP/non-SAP systems, balance agility with governance (especially with APIs/microservices), and how do you measure implementation success? Real-world examples would be very helpful.

entry.title: Re: APIs for Warehousing - OData v4. Count Physical Inven...
entry.content:
First, ensure the Physical Inventory Item is created successfully by performing a GET request for the WhsePhysicalInventoryItem entity:

/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_PHYS_INV_DOCUMENT_SRV/WhsePhysicalInventoryItem

Verify its existence using filters (e.g., PhysicalInventoryDocument and Item).

After confirming its existence, proceed with the PUT request for the WhsePhysicalInventoryCountItem.

Split the batch process into two steps:

Step 1: Send a batch with the PUT request for WhsePhysicalInventoryItem.

Step 2: After confirming creation, send a batch with the PUT request for WhsePhysicalInventoryCountItem.

entry.title: How to post surplus which is displaying in to be posted area in Aw01n.
entry.content:
Dear Team,

How to post surplus which is displaying in to be posted area in Aw01n.

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager: Job REFRESH_ADMIN_DATA_FROM_SUPPORT do not retrieve the new customer...
entry.content: Hello Kent, Thank you for reaching out SAP Community. For this type of issue, please first check the VAR configuration as described in KBA 2499200 step by step. -------------------- II. In case your system is a newly installed on 7.2 SP05 or higher and multi-customer scenario is not yet configured, For Type A customer, ... -------------------- Then check the jobs log REFRESH_ADMIN_DATA_FROM_SUPPORT with the subsequent ...(cont.) if the needed customer number or installation numbers appear. Finally, you can check some system logs to see if there is any relevant errors. Eg, SLG1 SE38 -> Report AI_SC_BACKCONN_ASY_TRACE Check if the needed installation number is downloaded via SE16 table AIINSTALLATIONS. Best regards, Huang

entry.title: Re: Data truncation with export to pdf
entry.content:
Thanks for the response, DonWilliams.

For your comment on SP, it's SP30 on Dev PC and SP37(latest) on Server PC.

Still, we are not sure what causes this PDF level data truncation problem in server.

Please review our comments and guide us on what made this problem.

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: interpretation algorithm 029 (Payment Order Number) - not clearing automatically
entry.content:
Hello all,

We have encountered an interesting issue related to Electronic Bank Statements (EBS) and automatic clearing in SAP. Supplier payments are not cleared automatically and instead end up in the APP: Reprocess Bank Statement Items.

The interpretation algorithm in use is 029 (Payment Order Number). When the reference in the memo line is not adjusted within the Reprocess Bank Statement Items app, the system allocates two invoices: one correct and one incorrect, with the incorrect invoice even belonging to another company code.

However, if we adjust the memo line and only retain the payment order before reallocating the open item, only the correct invoice is assigned.

Detailed Scenario:

  • In the memo line, the amount of the correct invoice (869 SEK) is included.
  • The incorrect invoice (belonging to a different company code) has "869" as the payment order.
  • It appears the system interprets the amount (869 SEK) as the payment order, which doesn’t align logically, as the incorrect invoice belongs to another company code.

Invoices:

  • Correct Invoice: Amount = 869 SEK, Payment Order = 688
  • Incorrect Invoice (Different Company Code): Amount = 35,037.52 SEK, Payment Order = 869

This issue requires manual adjustment of the memo line to correctly allocate items, which can be time-consuming and inefficient in the long run, particularly if such cases occur frequently.

Additionally, this issue seems somewhat related to SAP Note 3413102 - Algorithm 029 Payment Order (PYORD) for Several Accounts, but there are differences in the scenarios, and the note does not apply to SAP Cloud.

Has anyone encountered a similar issue with interpretation algorithm 029?

I would greatly appreciate any insights or solutions.

entry.title: Unexpect data inconsistncy; checks stopped Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST137
entry.content:
Dear Team,

During MIGO with respect to PO in SAP S/4Hana i got this error.

Tcode: FINSC_LEDGER

system is showing that not able to access the ledger. because Physical year verient is not assigned to the ledger . when i am assigning the ledger using above tcode system is showing the error. please find the snap below.

Example :assigning the 0001 Physical year variant to 0L ledger system is showing this error.

 

Message no. FINS_ACDOC_CUST137

 

FIN (Finance) SAP S/4HANA Finance for group reporting SAP S/4HANA Finance 

Thanks and Regards,

Balaji Ghewari.

entry.title: Re: Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journe...
entry.content:
The error indicates a missing or misconfigured destination or credentials. Follow these steps:

1. Destination Configuration: Verify the destination in SAP BTP Cockpit, including URL, authentication, and connectivity.

2. Credentials: Ensure the credential alias in the Integration Flow matches the secure store alias.

3. OData Adapter: Confirm the destination name, address, and message protocol (OData V2/V4) in the adapter configuration.

4. API Proxy: Test the API Proxy URL in Postman to ensure it works.

5. Redeploy: Save, redeploy the Integration Flow, and enable tracing for more details.

This error typically occurs due to missing secure store credentials or incorrect destination setup.

Try this and do let me know the outcomes.

entry.title: How to Get custom CDS view in Custom field in F4 value help
entry.content:

I am trying to add a custom field in EPPM projects with F4 value type. It's Picking a data from std CDS view.

entry.title: Unable to Retrieve Roles and Groups from IAS in UI5/CAP Application
entry.content:
I have IAS (Identity Authentication Service) configured for my application. Currently, I am using the /user-api/currentUser API to fetch user information. While this allows me to retrieve basic details about the logged-in user, I am unable to read the roles and groups assigned to the user in IAS.

I need guidance on how to properly fetch roles and group information from IAS within my UI5/CAP application. Are there additional APIs, configurations, or specific steps required to achieve this functionality? Your help in resolving this issue is appreciated.

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model   SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  SAPUI5

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content: @diego_renzi It seems like the Navigation Service can't resolve the target URL for this tile. There should be a step to set the configuration for the Navigation Service to work. Looping in my colleague @thomas-bruckner for further guidance.

entry.title: Re: Dual Landscape Required for Support Pack Updates or Not
entry.content:
Hi 

1. It all depends on your business requirements. You can either have dual landscapes for the SAP system upgrades, addressing one system after another, or we can follow the approach outlined in point number 2 onwards.
2. In our environment, we have taken a copy of the production system as a sandbox system, upgraded it, and tested all the business process scenarios. After that, we started the live landscapes.
3. Before upgrading the production environment, we created a clone of the production environment in the private network to calculate the overall time process of the upgrade to minimize overall downtime.

BR

SS

entry.title: Re: Mandatory attributes and Convention checks in Signavi...
entry.content:
Hello Vladimir,

1. we also use mandatory attributes for example for the information of authorization data. 

We created one rule for our specific mandatory attributes and included those which should give an error. I think an additional rule is only required if you want to control the level of error/warning/information.

2. feedback is mixed, of course a mandatory attribute always leads to additional effort especially if the content is not (yet) known and you have to put something like "n.a." or "not known". This will always be a kind of downside if you make an entry mandatory. so it should be chosen wisely and with purpose.

From a management perspective though you have then a nice opportunity to identify areas which are unclear

3. we did not make any changes so far but it depends on the overall strategy we want to follow in regards of a tansformation platform and reusing data from the process design in signavio process manager.

Hope this helps.

Best

Christian

entry.title: HowTo: S4H Public Cloud app to start iFlow in SAP CPI by enduser.
entry.content:
Dears,

I kindly ask for idea how to start existing iFlow in SAP CPI from S4H Public Cloud via tail or any other possibility - which way to choose.

Scenario: User opens tail (or something "else") in S4HC, fill some parameters like dates, etc, push button like "Start". This will trigger iFlow in SAP CPI and will pass filled parameters. 

Any idea is appreciated.

Thanks a lot.

Roman

entry.title: Re: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content: If you want to change the contents displayed in the ALV, you must change the global internal table passed to the parameter T_OUTTAB (TT_RDATA), as after the refresh the display will reflect the internal table. "Insert New Record", "Update" and so on should update the internal table, not the database table. Of course, you may do the changes at both, but the screens are usually designed to have a SAVE button to transfer the screen data to the database table(s).

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Dear @diego_renzi,

this is a situation that should not happen. Unfortunately at this point it is hard to judge whether the issue is caused by an incorrect configuration of the deployed SAP Build Apps application added to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition or an actual defect on Work Zone and the underlying services itself.

We would suggest opening an official customer ticket to the component EP-WZ-NAV adding the information stated in SAP Note 3541023. Especially the mentioned Mobile Network Trace will help to figure out the cause for the observed issue. If you struggle opening such a support ticket, you may reach out to sapmobilestart@sap.com alternatively.

Kind regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content: The back button is handled in standard, you don't have to do anything for '&F03'. The problem is probably that when leaving the ALV, you are asking at the same time to refresh the ALV screen, hence you are confusing ALV about what you really want to do.

entry.title: Re: Optimization on SELECT Statement using SORTED INTERNAL Table
entry.content:
1) A table sorted by declaration doesn't make SELECT go faster. SELECT is executed by the database. Sorted tables are faster only for ABAP read statements.

2) I don't know how you have made sure that the root cause was the SELECT itself. What is the time of execution of this SELECT? Maybe it's another part of your code? Please share SAT information and possibly the concerned execution plan if the issue is about SQL (the issue may also be an ABAP problem which loops at this SELECT, so the solution would be to take the SELECT out of the ABAP loop).

entry.title: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses

Thanks
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Account is currently blocked by user RFC_ALE during I...
entry.content: @newguy_cloud It doesn't make sense. Why don't you recommend this answer to your team mate now?

entry.title: How SAP Public Cloud Customize MRP Logic?
entry.content:
Hello, Experts

My client has a requirement that they want some of their unplanned orders to be excluded from MRP calculations because they use MTS and independent demand to manage production, and unplanned orders for R&D interfere with their management of supplies.

Of course, the first option is the MRP area feature, but given that they have not enabled it and that setting it up at this point may result in increased maintenance costs for the material data later on, they would like to consider being able to modify the MRP logic so that it doesn't run specific types of orders.

I know that it is possible to make changes to the MRP logic in S4 or ECC, but I haven't found a way to do so in the public cloud version, so I would like to ask the experts here if it is possible to implement this change and if so how should I do it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Tlanes are not getting created
entry.content:
Hi kannanGK,

-check SMQ2 (Inbound Queue) if there are any signs of failed transfer.
-check /SAPAPO/CCR t-code if there are any signs of failed transfer.
-check /SAPAPO/CPP t-code if there are any signs of failed transfer.
-check SLG1 t-code, Object: CIFSCM if there are any errors 

Let the thread know, so we can help better.

Br

Geri

entry.title: Hana studio version 2.3.71 - Copy the structure of composite provider
entry.content:
HI,

I'm flabbergosted because I want to copy from structure A to structure B of composite provider but there is not have the function ' save as' when I right click on the structure A.

How to copy the structure B by reference the strucutre A ?

Thanks

Bastien

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content:
Thanks Sandra,

But, it not Show my Yahoo Mail in Linked Section ?

entry.title: Re: Error During Preview Application for Fiori Tools Gene...
entry.content: For now as a workaround, just stop and start the instance, it will work.

entry.title: Re: 3/3 From JavaScript to TypeScript: The Shocking Results of Our SAPUI5 Transformation
entry.content:
@PetrBecka, a great series of blog posts!

I fully agree on TypeScript being game changer (I also blogged about this last year) and it will always be my preferred choice of the many reasons you provided.

Another positive side-effect of using TypeScript was, that it opened up my view for modern JavaScript in general. Even plain old JavaScript is very powerful today and using TypeScript really helped me to look closer at the modern language features and re-use them in UI5 projects (I talked about this in more detail on UI5con).

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content: Course URL: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills . Where did you see a mention to the /LRN/ courses?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports and SOS Legal
entry.content: You may post this question in sos legal forum, as they have sql report builder, they would be able to answer if they have connector for CR, thanks.

entry.title: Request for Quotation & Contracts in Fieldglass system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

I would like to inquire about specific functionalities available in the SAP Fieldglass system, and I was wondering if you could also provide any relevant Help Portal links for further reference.

  1. Request for Quotation (RFQ):
    Does Fieldglass support a process where a request for quotation can be created and sent to multiple vendors to obtain price quotes? If so, could you provide details on how this process works within the system?

  2. Contract Creation in SOW:
    As part of the Statement of Work (SOW) process, does Fieldglass have functionality to create contracts? And that contact will be reference for multiple other documents If this is available, I would appreciate any information or documentation explaining how contracts are generated and managed in the system.

Your guidance and any resources you could provide would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your support, and I look forward to your response.

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content: Contact sso@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay-Payout curves-Interpolation
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec-Thanks for the clarification. Will wait to see your updated blog.

entry.title: Re: Data truncation with export to pdf
entry.content:
Thanks for the response, umasaral.

We verified the font settings in Windows registry for both Dev and Server. See below screenshot.

And for the SAP SP point of view, the server has latest SP37 compared to dev which has SP30.

In server, having latest SAP SP, it should not give these kind of issues.

It looks the problem is with fonts as above first screenshot but no idea how to get over this data truncation issue.

Any other thoughts, kindly let us know.

Thanks and Regards.

entry.title: If data deleted in IAS, can we retrieve back or need to import new?
entry.content: I have deleted data person in IAS due to wrongly flow data to IAS. Can I able to flow it back or need to upload new data?

entry.title: Re: Concept of Discontinuation Data - Material Master and BOM
entry.content:
Hello,
1.
If I have no idea when the actual new item will be implemented, would it then instead be possible to use this functionality as a signal only/information only about coming supersession? Means information that Part A is to be discountinued and will be replaced by Part B (as information only). By that keep it on material level only.

By that handle the BOM update manually, the very same day when the actual implentation is, do the update of super BOM and phantom BOM with local DCN instead?

Would this be possible, and would this affect anything negative? 

2. When using this function as in this forum thread, and reduced as I describe in no 1, does this function on material level include the sales history and FC, and will that history auto be transferred from Part A to Part B (the superseding material)?

Hope you understand what I mean, thankful for any reply that might help me.

/Erik

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content:
Hello Sandra,

'Working with local classes' part has 'Task 1: Copy Template (Optional)'
Steps
Open the source code of global class/LRN/CL_S4D400_CLS_LOCAL_CLASS in the ABAP editor.
In the Eclipse toolbar, choose Open ABAP Development Object. Alternatively, press Ctrl + Shift + A.
Enter /LRN/CL_S4D400_CLS as search string.
From the list of development objects choose /LRN/CL_S4D400_CLS_LOCAL_CLASS, then choose OK.

entry.title: Authentication error while using SaaS Routes for custom domain in multitenancy
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have followed this guide to incorporate custom domains and routes for multitenant CAP application:

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-cap-multitenant-saas/blob/main/docu/4-expert/-CloudFoundry-/custom-domain-usage/README.md

I have faced issue during performing step 6 (specifically 6.14) 

While accessing application with custom route and custom domain im facing OAuth error, it looks like application tries to access xsuaa service with Saas route name (test1234) as subscriber tenant name
https://test1234.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth_error

 

When accessing same application on same subaccount without custom SaaS route (but still with custom domain), everything works properly.

What can be reason for such issue ? oauth-redirect uris and tenant_host_pattern are populated according to guide linked above.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SolutionManager in Standard Support mode
entry.content: Could you please define exactly what do you mean with "does not exceed Standard Support privileges"? I work in Solution Manager support and I don't really understand the query. Maybe you would like to know more about the Solution Manager usage rights? Please check https://support.sap.com/en/alm/usage-rights.html

entry.title: Re: Useful ways to use ‘Variables’ and ‘Cardinality’ rule functions in Onboarding and Employee centr
entry.content: Nice and interesting blog

entry.title: Re: Mandatory attributes and Convention checks in Signavi...
entry.content:
Thank you Christian. Much appreciated.

Kind regards.

 

Vladimir

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Dear @Suzanne_Heiob 

Hello, I have a question.

Could you tell me when the certification exam questions are updated? Is it after the half-year release? I want to confirm the best timing to take the exam. This is my understanding, is that correct?

  1. Updating the exam twice a year (after the half-year release)
  2. If the deadline is March 31, 2025, will the questions remain the same whether I take it now or just before the deadline?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: hxehost:53075 not responding
entry.content: Hi, thanks for the solution! Does somebody know how to fix this issue in the firewall settings permanently. When I start with VM again, this solution does not help me anymore. Greetings

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud UM – Enhancing Report Management with the power of generative AI copilot – Joule
entry.content:
Hello dear @marcus_kleiner_dfmc ,

Thank you as well for your question!

At the moment, Joule is unable to retrieve specific reports based on a question and then trigger the corresponding function chain. It is currently capable of performing analysis and providing responses for specific report pages, queries related to uploaded files and queries in the Activity Show screen. However, we are working on exciting enhancements that align closely with your expectations. We’ll keep you updated once these features are released.

Kind Regards,

Milica

entry.title: Re: Hiring 2 employees on the same position, the first one is successful and the last one is failing
entry.content:
Hi, this could be due to the settings on the position. We hire employees into mass positions via Onboarding regularly. This will not relate to they way Onboarding is configured, but how the position is configured. You can check these settings on the position.

  • Mass Position: Yes
  • FTE: review this value

Regards

Frans

entry.title: CAP for Nodejs运维练习
entry.content:
本文档目的是帮助您初步了解部署在BTP上应用的基本运维方式，阅读时间约为30分钟。

 

本练习的使用前提是完成 CAP for Nodejs部署练习 - SAP Community

 

如果您对BTP感兴趣，BTP个人精选内容目录 | SAP Blogs 可能有更多你需要的内容

 

本文档为CAP for Nodejs部署练习 | SAP Blogs 的后续，本练习会展示在部署后如何进行运维

本文档包括以下部分：

1.部署完成后平台发生的变化

2.容器事件及应用日志查看

3.应用对应的身份配置

4.如何添加监控措施

 

1.部署完成后平台发生的变化

完成部署后，首先，在子账户-空间-本次部署的目标空间内的应用程序列表里，会多出三个应用

 

其中，cpapp-db-deployer应用只会在部署时启动，用于部署CAP程序内的HANA Cloud内容，cpapp-srv是我们的后端服务，approuter是装载了我们前端内容的服务，如果你同时使用了html5repo装载前端代码，则可以在子账户-HTML5应用程序内找到nsrisks2应用

 

在左侧从应用程序子菜单切换到服务-实例子菜单后，可以看到四个服务实例，其中cpapp-auth代表了身份中心，cpapp-db代表了嵌入到HANA Cloud的hdi-shared容器（详细含义请参考其他资料），

 

cpapp-destination代表了在本空间内的destination服务，点击该服务实例名称，即可进入服务实例主页，首先默认进入 引用应用 子菜单，可以看到哪些应用可以访问该服务实例；左菜单选择 目标，可以看到5个destination，分别来自mta.yaml 中module approuter properties内的srv-destination，和resources cpapp-destination内定义的cpapp-srv-api和ui5，以及系统自动生成的连接到auth和html5repo的两个destination

 

回到空间主页，左菜单的 路由，可以看到两个路由，意思就是对应两个应用程序的两个公网URL

左菜单的 空间成员 和子账户权限略有不同，这里的 空间成员 指的是Cloud Foundry内的org-space权限，有这些权限才可以配置/部署应用

 

2.容器事件及应用日志查看

部署完成后，在子账户-空间-应用主页内，可以查看到应用对应的公网url，还可以看到+实例的按钮，这里指的是实际运行应用的容器数，可以通过点击增加数量（负载均衡还是ha？），新增的每个实例会占用与旧实例一致的内存量

在左菜单的事件选项内，可以看到容器发生事件的日志记录，此处无需配置，对接的是容器底层的运行日志

在左菜单的日志选项内，暂时看不到任何内容，点击左上角的 打开Kibana 仪表盘，也不会有内容，因为logging服务没有被创建，即使被创建过了也需要和该应用绑定，并在应用内写日志到logging服务

 

 

3.应用对应的身份配置

在应用内部的左菜单的 安全性下，可以看到 范围和角色模板，其内容都来自xs-security.json内的定义

此时回到子账户-安全性-角色集合，可以看到RiskManager-dev角色集合，这里的内容是来自mta.yaml resources cpapp-auth内的。

 

4.如何添加监控措施

看过了主要的变化，接下来让我们练习如何添加监控信息

首先需要为子账户启用一个application-logs服务实例，然后要将应用与服务实例相连，可以使用命令行或者cockpit来操作

https://help.sap.com/docs/application-logging-service/sap-application-logging-service/bind-your-application-using-command-line-interface

 

简单来说，在应用部署好之后，进入子账户-目标空间后，在左菜单的 实例列表页面内点击右上角的创建，

选择application-logs服务，选择lite计划，填入实例名称后即可 点击 下一步-创建

创建完成后还是在空间内的实例列表页面点击新实例来打开右菜单，在右菜单的 绑定的应用程序 处点击创建，选择目标应用后确认创建

最后回到应用程序列表页面，点击目标应用进入应用主页后点击左菜单的日志-打开Kibana仪表盘，即可看到该应用的日志了

 

 

但更推荐直接在mta.yaml内定义该服务实例以及绑定：

在resources部分添加：

  - name: cf-logging

    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service

    parameters:

      service: application-logs

      service-plan: lite

 

然后在需要监控的应用的require部分添加依赖即可，我这里是在cpapp-srv这个module里的requires添加了一条      - name: cf-logging

 

然后是在应用内添加监控：

进入srv/risk-service.js

第二行添加：

const generalLOG = cds.log('generalLOG')

 

然后在你想记录日志的地方添加

generalLOG.info ('generalLOG', test)

 

Nodejs请参考：

About | CF Node.js Logging Support

 

Java请参考：

Home · SAP/cf-java-logging-support Wiki · GitHub

entry.title: Release period & Product availability
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to start using the automated release of production orders by setting up an automated Job that triggers based on the "Scheduled Release" date.  However, I've noticed that component availability is checked for the "Order Start" date rather than the "Scheduled Release" date. This creates a risk of missing parts when the automated job is triggered to release the order.

One solution I considered is setting a "Float Before Production" to push the scheduled start date earlier. This approach means I wouldn't use the "Release Period" in the scheduling margin key.

The challenge is that we produce daily outputs, which are reflected in the MRP through the distribution key (GLEI). If I set a "Float Before Production," the output gets distributed over the period before the scheduled start of operations, which isn't desirable since no output will occur in that period.

What is the best approach to address this situation while maintaining accurate production scheduling and material availability?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @kamala13 to my knowledge SAPforMe is not able to show the updated expiry dates - as far as I am aware the team is working on it but there are also banners on SAPforMe informing about this missing information. Please look into SAP Learning for the most precise expiration dates.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Bank Account number is truncated the Custom CDS View.
entry.content:
1. Custom CDS View do not give the correct results for the bank account number.
  2. Truncated bank account number is displayed in the Custom CDS View preview.
  3. Only 18 characters of the bank account number is displayed in the Custom CDS View display.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Bank Account number is truncated the Custom CDS View.
entry.content: Please, find the analysis given in the SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3560190

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Deployment Options – embedded vs decentral warehouse management
entry.content: Great Read !! Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @its_naoki,

Please find here the answer to your questions:

  1. Updating the exam twice a year (after the half-year release) -> it is depending on the solution or topic you are certified in how often the exam will be updated. Most of our cloud solution exams update at minimum twice per year. Other solutions might update only once per year or even bi-yearly. 
  2. If the deadline is March 31, 2025, will the questions remain the same whether I take it now or just before the deadline?
    The assessment to stay certified might be updated more often than the exam. Everytime there is a new delta update you will see a new assessment being published. The assessments will be updated minimum once per year. So we highly recommend to take it now when your due date is March 31, 2025. A new one might not be published before april and we want you to keep track on the latest features and functions of the solution you are certified in.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: how to use "one time contract accounts"
entry.content:
Henk, 

Understood you are planning to integrate the SD with FICA for the receivables management, but there are certain pre-requisites as well with respect to the BPs to be in sync within FICA and SD.

If you are using a BP in SD for posting SD order and subsequently SD invoice, that BP should also exists as Contract partner role (MKK) other wise you will not be create contract account in first place. 

Secondly, with respect to one time contract account, its not going to be easy if you have to manage payment settlement process and further downstream processes, like Returns or dunning.

Its better to go by the Normal Contract account process with SD FICA integration rather than going by 1 time CA approach. 

Thanks

Amlan

 

 

 

 

Not sure which Industry solution you are in, but for Utilities and Telecom, for One Time Contract account, you can multiple BPs as account holders.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Serial Number Profile for Mandatory...
entry.content:
Hello hslee1,

Changing the serial number usage (mandatory/optional/...), by movement type is on the roadmap for Q1/2025 for S/4HANA Public Cloud, as you can see here: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?BC=901B0ED1A0641ED9B2C72B7AC3CF60E6&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=7FECA36531611EEEA0C583F4A0346E9E 

After this is released, you can e. g. set procedure MMSL (Maintain goods receipt and issue doc.) in your serial number profile to optional and just set goods movement for purchase order related entries to mandatory in the new configuration UI.

I hope this fulfils your requirement.

Best,
Alex

entry.title: Sandbox and Development Temp outside RISE landscape for S/4HANA version upgrade
entry.content:
Hi,

We have existing client who is already on RISE S/4HANA PCE and planning to upgrade to S/4HANA 2023.

The plan is to have Sandbox upgrade first and also setup temporary development to support Production system while doing upgrade project.

For these 2 temp servers required, client is asking if possible to host temp servers outside RISE system landscape ie on any of hyperscaler? If yes, for Sandbox upgrade and DEV temp setup is customer/SI responsibility and how about the connection into RISE for DEV temp and other impact to RISE we need to take into consideration?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - NC Disposition on Order POD
entry.content:
HI @okakoshow ,

in the Order POD routings must use a releaxed flow: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/order-pod

There are some limitations to using this type of routing in the POD:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/routings-with-relaxed-flow

Hope this helps.

Best,

Mike

entry.title: Re: Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journe...
entry.content: i had same issue for this. based on the learning journey, we've configured the api proxy can access directly without any credential, because it is already setup before based on the learning steps.

entry.title: Re: Mass role creation and addition of tcodes to role menu
entry.content:
LSMW will help on Mass roles creation and for update Organizational/Field value, please use PFCGMASSVAL

 

Ashish Semwal

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Serial Number Profile for Mandatory...
entry.content: I just found out that the What's New and help documentation for 2502 was just released. Here's the link to the documentation for this feature: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/b3df23e28ac348d88d5cc0e0137340f9.html
